summary: Frontend testing for GDPR cookie consent banner and Italian translations - ALL TESTS PASSED. Verified: (1) Cookie consent banner appears on first visit with 3 buttons (Manage Preferences, Reject Non-Essential, Accept All), (2) Accept All hides banner and saves consent to localStorage, (3) Banner does NOT reappear after accepting, (4) Manage Preferences shows toggles for Functional and Analytics with Strictly Necessary always active, (5) Cookie banner fully translated to Italian when language is 'it', (6) All 8 static pages show correct Italian titles and content.

cookie_consent_banner.banner_appears_on_first_visit: PASS - Banner appears after 1 second delay
cookie_consent_banner.three_buttons_present: PASS - Manage Preferences, Reject Non-Essential, Accept All
cookie_consent_banner.accept_all_hides_banner: PASS - Banner hidden after clicking Accept All
cookie_consent_banner.consent_saved_to_localStorage: PASS - Saved under key 'chiantin_cookie_consent' with type, preferences, timestamp
cookie_consent_banner.banner_does_not_reappear: PASS - Banner does NOT reappear after page reload
cookie_consent_banner.manage_preferences_toggles: PASS - Functional and Analytics toggles with Strictly Necessary always active

static_page_layout.footer_links: PASS - Privacy, Terms, Compliance, Contact links all present

english_content_default.privacy_page_english: PASS - 'Privacy Policy' title when language is 'en'

success_rate.frontend: 100% - all cookie consent and Italian translation features working correctly

test_credentials: No auth required - all pages are public
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 164 tested the new GDPR cookie consent banner and Italian translations for all 8 static pages. Cookie banner uses localStorage key 'chiantin_cookie_consent' and appears 1 second after page load. Language is controlled via localStorage key 'atlas_language' ('en' or 'it'). All translations are in /app/frontend/src/translations.js (cookie consent around line 182-196 for EN, line 1045-1059 for IT). Static page content is in /app/frontend/src/staticContent.js and /app/frontend/src/legalContent.js. All tests passed.
